title: Freeze split-brain regression fixture (E-02/E-03) — red-now
action: Create skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs reproducing E-02/E-03 (SPEC §2, VER-01..06, D-04). Self-contained: recursively copy (readdirSync, NO hand-kept file list) the real skills/bee-hive tree into a temp SOURCE patched to BEE_VERSION 0.1.43, copy real .bee/bin/lib into a temp repo RUNTIME at 0.1.44, seed .agents+.claude projections at 0.1.43, write .bee/onboarding.json with drift:false. Re-implement hashTree INLINE (test_onboard_bee.mjs exports nothing; do not extract from the green suite). Spawn real onboard_bee from the stale (0.1.43) launcher; wrap the spawn in try/catch and first confirm it actually RAN (parseable status, not ENOENT). Assert TARGET: status RED (blocked_downgrade) AND --apply zero-mutation (hashTree identical). Because current code returns changes_needed and would copy 0.1.43 libs over 0.1.44 runtime, the fixture is RED: on the controlled defect path it prints `FREEZE-RED: split-brain defect present (OBSERVED=... EXPECTED=blocked_downgrade+zero-mutation)` and exits with SENTINEL code 3 (distinct from node's uncaught-throw exit 1). Exits 0 only when target met.
verify: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs > /tmp/claude-1000/-home-thanhsmind-projects-goglbe-beegog/be74b666-2991-4e46-9c4b-55484d8724fd/scratchpad/reg.out 2>&1; ec=$?; grep -q 'FREEZE-RED: split-brain defect present' /tmp/claude-1000/-home-thanhsmind-projects-goglbe-beegog/be74b666-2991-4e46-9c4b-55484d8724fd/scratchpad/reg.out && [ $ec -eq 3 ] && echo WRAPPER-PASS

fixture copies real trees via readdirSync recursive (NO hand-enumerated lib list) and re-implements hashTree inline
confirms onboard actually ran (parseable status, not ENOENT) BEFORE asserting the defect
asserts TARGET: status RED (blocked_downgrade) AND apply zero-mutation via hashTree before==after
on confirmed defect prints exact signature 'FREEZE-RED: split-brain defect present' and exits SENTINEL 3 (not 1); a crash yields neither the signature nor exit 3
prohibitions: NOT added to commands.verify while red
no fix to onboard_bee/mirror/detector in this cell
no /tmp string handed to node — use scratchpad abs path or stdin
